item.title: The Beauty of the Internet and Products
item.description: Lately, I traveled to Taiwan. Packing has been a big problem for me whenever I travel, especially if I have to stay at the destination location for a longer period of time. I am a big book reader and rely on books for work a lot. It’s troubling because physical books are heavy and could easily make luggage go overweight; it doesn’t help when I want to bring a small library (I try to limit myself to 15 books now) with me.

item.title: Blogging Again
item.description: This blog is not the first blog I have started. And this post is not the first blog post I have written. In fact, I have written many posts that never see the light of the day. Some of them are buried somewhere in the note or document applications, and some are hidden in my laptop’s directories as markdown files. If not for the imposter syndrome, fear of being imperfect, and lack of conviction I could have started a blog roughly four years ago and the time thereafter.
